description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:3.5 Docker image. Include a global before_script that runs "apk update && apk add openssl", then "wget https://github.com/spf13/hugo/releases/download/v0.18.1/hugo_0.18.1_Linux-64bit.tar.gz", verifies the file with "echo \"e8ba723c508e87912970f132534c64dc  hugo_0.18.1_Linux-64bit.tar.gz\" | md5sum -c", extracts it with "tar xf hugo_0.18.1_Linux-64bit.tar.gz --strip-components=1 && mv hugo_0.18.1_linux_amd64 hugo && cp ./hugo /usr/bin", and prints the version with "hugo version". Add a pages job that runs in the default stage, executes "hugo", publishes the "public" directory as a pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch. Add a test job that also runs in the default stage, executes "hugo", and runs on all branches except master. No services, caches, or additional deployment steps are required.
